title: Nemos Stuff 2: electric boogaloo
description: another mod with stuff i thought would be cool. that's about it
body:
This mod I made includes
- 6 hatsune miku music disks
- a wizard staff that summons lightning
- ghost steak
- pencil sword
- like 5 new painting
- recipe for trident
- a new Truffula Biome

i made this cause i needed music disks for a miku concert i was gonna do and decided to make more stuff for it

you should download this cause like, it's cool
